name: altium-kicad
description: Read Altium binary .SchDoc/.SchLib/.PcbDoc and KiCad .kicad_sch with no Altium or KiCad install, run ERC/power/pinmap/BOM/diff checks, and draw KiCad schematics. Zero-dependency Python CLI for AI coding agents. Not an Altium-to-KiCad converter.

interface.shortDescription: Read Altium & KiCad schematics, run ERC/design checks, draw KiCad — no EDA install required.
interface.longDescription: Drives the zero-dependency `akcli` CLI: parse Altium .SchDoc/.SchLib/.PcbDoc and KiCad .kicad_sch/.kicad_sym/.kicad_pcb into one normalized model, extract netlists, run ERC-lite / power-rail / BOM / pinmap / revision-diff checks, author and apply KiCad schematics from an op-list, and source real JLCPCB/LCSC parts. Bundles eight task skills — circuit-design (core mechanics), schematic-authoring, schematic-review, circuit-debug, altium-interop, parts-sourcing, jlcpcb-capabilities, and design-calc (31 standards-cited engineering calculators). It is not an Altium-to-KiCad converter: Altium is read/analyze-only; KiCad is the only writable target.
defaultPrompt: Read main.SchDoc and summarize the components, rails, and connectors.
Run a severity-ranked design review of board.kicad_sch and report the findings.
Draw a 3V3 LDO regulator block into board.kicad_sch, then verify the netlist.
Diff v1.SchDoc against v2.SchDoc and tell me what regressed.
